title: International Business Cell | MBA IB DSE
description:
The International Business Cell is where MBA IB DSE students discuss about International trade polices and industry changes on a global scale.
DSE MBA IB | University of Delhi | MIB | Since 1995
headings: To know more, connect with them
paragraphs: Importance and impact of international business has increased due to increase in globalization. There is a commensurate need to identify its emerging issues and assess the potential contributions. Keeping this in mind, the International Business Cell tries to bridge the gap between students and information regarding the ever-changing world of International Business. The International Business Cell is a student led cell that aims to facilitate students in attaining valuable knowledge about global business practices.
Arrange for Guest Lectures from industry experts

Our flagship event is the Global Case Study Competition, the final round of which happens during the management fest of our college, Synergy. Teams from B-schools all over the country participate in it and the finalists are called up to campus for the final round.

For any complaints against any constituent member of the MBA IB Student Body, Kindly reach out to PRESIDENT@MIBDU.ORG

There is a commensurate need to identify its emerging issues and assess the potential contributions. Keeping this in mind, the International Business Cell tries to bridge the gap between students and information regarding the ever-changing world of International Business. The International Business Cell is a student led cell that aims to facilitate students in attaining valuable knowledge about global business practices. ​ What we do: Weekly newsletter, “The Downtown” Organize Case Study Competitions regularly Organize Article Writing Competitions Arrange for Guest Lectures from industry experts Samvaad, a parliamentary debate competition ​ Our flagship event is the Global Case Study Competition, the final round of which happens during the management fest of our college, Synergy.
